name: Montalto Vineyard & Olive Grove
address: 33 Shoreham Rd, Red Hill South VIC 3937

awards: James Halliday Winery of the Year 2022

signature: Single Vineyard Pinot Noir and a Sunday lunch beneath the olive grove canopy
editorNote:
Montalto is the Peninsula at its most painterly. Drive in and the estate opens up  -  lake, sculptures, kitchen garden, olive grove  -  before you've reached the cellar door. This is the place you bring visitors to prove that Victoria does wine country properly.

The restaurant earns its hat honestly. Pasta made daily, produce grown on-site or sourced from neighbours within five kilometres, and a wine list anchored by the estate but ranging thoughtfully. The terrace in summer is close to perfect.

Arrive early for a cellar door tasting before lunch. Set aside the afternoon.

visiting.tastingNote: Walk-ins welcome for groups of 1–8; tasting fee redeemable on $45+ purchase. Wine & Cheese tasting $40/person also available.

restaurant.name: The Restaurant at Montalto
restaurant.description: Estate-to-plate kitchen using produce from the on-site garden. 1 Hat, Age Good Food Guide 2025. The Piazza offers a casual dining alternative.

editorVerdict: Montalto is one of the Peninsula's most complete estates: the wines are genuinely good, the restaurant earns its hat, and the kitchen garden is not decorative — it supplies the kitchen. Simon Black's winemaking respects site above all, and the single-vineyard releases make an honest case for what Red Hill South terroir can do. If you only have time for one estate that covers all bases — vines, table, grounds — this is the call.

faq.q: Does Montalto take walk-ins or do you need to book?
faq.a: Walk-ins are welcome for groups of 1–8 people. Bookings are available for those who prefer a reserved session. The restaurant requires a separate booking.
Yes. The Restaurant at Montalto (1 Hat, Age Good Food Guide 2025) serves Modern Australian cuisine with produce from the estate kitchen garden. The Piazza offers casual dining.
No — the official site explicitly states no pets allowed onsite at Montalto.

heroImage.alt: Montalto Vineyard and Olive Grove — cellar door, restaurant and estate at Red Hill South, Mornington Peninsula
